# LUME PRO Cappuccino Cups (12 pcs.)

(Ref. No. 3532)

154,00 zł + VAT

154,00 zł

You have zero of LUME PRO Cappuccino Cups (12 pcs.) in your basket. Activate to add the productADD TO BASKET

## LUME PRO Cappuccino Cups (12 pcs.)

### Set of 12 cups - 180 ml

The Lume Collection sheds a modern glow on Italian elegance. Imagined by Milanese designer Federica Biasi, the white porcelain cups bring a slight twist to the traditional Italian barista know‒how.Its sleek lines, both refined and robust, are complemented by an angular rim for an exceptional experience. Each cup is designed as the perfect companion to every coffee moment.The five sizes available are adapted to a range of recipes. And with their matching saucers, the cups are perfectly stable and stackable, to fit into any environment, restaurants or cafés, hotels or offices. A contemporary classic.• Capacity: 180 ml• Dimensions: height 69 mm, Ø 82 mm• Dishwasher resistant

![17349077925918](https://www.nespresso.com/ecom/medias/sys_master/public/17349077925918.png)

## Polecamy

[![responsive-standard-2000x2000](https://www.nespresso.com/ecom/medias/sys_master/public/12138037280798/responsive-standard-2000x2000.png?impolicy=product&imwidth=130)**Showcase** Learn more](https://www.nespresso.com/pro/pl/en/order/accessories/pro/showcase)

[237,00 zł](https://www.nespresso.com/pro/pl/en/order/accessories/pro/showcase)

The perfect way to display the complete range of Pro capsules. The box has a capacity of 80 capsules. The inside of the lid displays a visual of the complete range of Grands Crus. (26 x 26 x 9.6 cm, supplied empty).

You have zero of Showcase in your basket. Activate to add the productADD TO BASKET

[![A-1262-ResponsiveStandard](https://www.nespresso.com/ecom/medias/sys_master/public/32602860650526/A-1262-ResponsiveStandard.png?impolicy=product&imwidth=130)**Financiers Chocolat** Learn more](https://www.nespresso.com/pro/pl/en/order/accessories/pro/financiers-chocolat)

[39,00 zł](https://www.nespresso.com/pro/pl/en/order/accessories/pro/financiers-chocolat)

Intense, chocolatey flavor combined with tonka bean extract, which gives the cookies floral‒vanilla notes. To maintain the high quality and freshness, each cookie is individually packaged. The package contains 120 grams of cookies (15 pieces).

You have zero of Financiers Chocolat in your basket. Activate to add the productADD TO BASKET
